new_value: {"notes":"AUDIT at base revision 8e02a7ae924a226c91c23d8d19f0f5350c248364. ROOT RECONCILIATION: 42 firmware roots total = 39 roots with at least one accepted runtime WIN and 3 BLOCKED roots. The 39 WIN roots are 35 passing lichen/tests roots plus bridge-zephyr, gateway, puck, and lora_ping. BLOCKED roots are app_identity (project-LICHEN-b9od), ping_l2 (project-LICHEN-35qo), and physical-only test_blink (project-LICHEN-902l). TEST SCENARIOS: lichen/tests/* contains exactly 62 runtime scenarios: 60 WIN, 2 BLOCKED (one each app_identity/ping_l2). Gateway sample.yaml adds 2 separate build-only scenarios; they are not runtime tests and are excluded from the 62 denominator. Runtime-platform denominator correction: 137 unique scenario/allowed-platform pairs; the 97 integration_platform entries are a subset of those 137, so prior prose count 234 double-counted them. PRODUCTION/SAMPLE BACKEND ROWS: 42 recorded rows = 9 WIN, 11 FAIL, 22 BLOCKED. Bridge 16 rows: 2 WIN (native_sim executed as native_sim/native/64 host qualifier; qemu_x86), 10 FAIL legacy/unmapped fragments under 2u26, 4 BLOCKED canonical hardware targets under k8o1. Gateway 10: 2 WIN (native64, qemu), 8 BLOCKED (native32 under o4yi plus 7 boards under n39k). Puck 11: 2 WIN (native64, T-Echo), 1 FAIL tbeam_supreme under w8rd, 8 BLOCKED (native32 under o4yi plus 7 boards under v9qz). lora_ping 4: 3 WIN T-Echo/RAK4631/Nucleo and 1 BLOCKED T1000-E under sr55. test_blink 1 BLOCKED under 902l. FRAGMENT INVENTORY: bridge 14 stems/28 files, 4 canonical and 10 stale; gateway 12 stems/22 files representing 10 target selectors plus 2 optional T-Deck validation overlays that are not targets; puck 11 stems/22 files representing 10 valid targets plus stale tbeam_supreme; test_blink 1 stem/1 file; lora_ping 3 stems/4 files plus fragmentless Nucleo backend. Generic Heltec/T-Deck Renode board models are not declared lora_ping backends; they are classified only for apps that declare those boards. Nucleo lora_ping is explicitly fragmentless external Renode backend. RAK status is app-specific and noncontradictory: lora_ping WIN; bridge/puck/gateway remain BLOCKED pending their own runtime evidence. SELECTORS: flattened stems are valid auto-merge names, but command selectors must use slash-qualified HWMv2 names. nrf52840_lichen and command-line t_echo_nrf52840 are stale and explicitly tracked by updated project-LICHEN-xy79. Bridge generic native_sim has one declared path; native_sim/native/64 is its required ARM host qualifier, not an additional omitted 32-bit row. All FAIL/BLOCKED rows have concrete active remediation Beads. Superseding notes govern provisional contradictions: gateway native32 uses o4yi, and puck native64 final status is WIN."}

new_value: {"notes":"AUDIT at base revision 8e02a7ae924a226c91c23d8d19f0f5350c248364. ROOT RECONCILIATION: 42 firmware roots total = 39 roots with at least one accepted runtime WIN and 3 BLOCKED roots. The 39 WIN roots are 35 passing lichen/tests roots plus bridge-zephyr, gateway, puck, and lora_ping. BLOCKED roots are app_identity (project-LICHEN-b9od), ping_l2 (project-LICHEN-35qo), and physical-only test_blink (project-LICHEN-902l). TEST SCENARIOS: lichen/tests/* contains exactly 62 runtime scenarios: 60 WIN, 2 BLOCKED (one each app_identity/ping_l2). Gateway sample.yaml adds 2 separate build-only scenarios; they are not runtime tests and are excluded from the 62 denominator. Runtime-platform denominator correction: 137 unique scenario/allowed-platform pairs; the 97 integration_platform entries are a subset of those 137, so prior prose count 234 double-counted them. PRODUCTION/SAMPLE BACKEND ROWS: 42 recorded rows = 9 WIN, 11 FAIL, 22 BLOCKED. Bridge 16 rows: 2 WIN (native_sim executed as native_sim/native/64 host qualifier; qemu_x86), 10 FAIL legacy/unmapped fragments under 2u26, 4 BLOCKED canonical hardware targets under k8o1. Gateway 10: 2 WIN (native64, qemu), 8 BLOCKED (native32 under o4yi plus 7 boards under n39k). Puck 11: 2 WIN (native64, T-Echo), 1 FAIL tbeam_supreme under w8rd, 8 BLOCKED (native32 under o4yi plus 7 boards under v9qz). lora_ping 4: 3 WIN T-Echo/RAK4631/Nucleo and 1 BLOCKED T1000-E under sr55. test_blink 1 BLOCKED under 902l. FRAGMENT INVENTORY: bridge 14 stems/28 files, 4 canonical and 10 stale; gateway 12 stems/22 files representing 10 target selectors plus 2 optional T-Deck validation overlays that are not targets; puck 11 stems/22 files representing 10 valid targets plus stale tbeam_supreme; test_blink 1 stem/1 file; lora_ping 3 stems/4 files plus fragmentless Nucleo backend. Generic Heltec/T-Deck Renode board models are not declared lora_ping backends; they are classified only for apps that declare those boards. Nucleo lora_ping is explicitly fragmentless external Renode backend. RAK status is app-specific and noncontradictory: lora_ping WIN; bridge/puck/gateway remain BLOCKED pending their own runtime evidence. SELECTORS: flattened stems are valid auto-merge names, but command selectors must use slash-qualified HWMv2 names. nrf52840_lichen and command-line t_echo_nrf52840 are stale and explicitly tracked by updated project-LICHEN-xy79. Bridge generic native_sim has one declared path; native_sim/native/64 is its required ARM host qualifier, not an additional omitted 32-bit row. All FAIL/BLOCKED rows have concrete active remediation Beads. Superseding notes govern provisional contradictions: gateway native32 uses o4yi, and puck native64 final status is WIN.\nAUDIT ERRATA after three independent reviews: current scoped metadata, which governs the final result set, has 138 unique scenario/platform_allow pairs and 98 integration_platform pairs; the prior 137/97 values apply only to base 8e02a7a before native_sim/native/64 was added to lichen/tests/icmpv6/testcase.yaml. All 98 integration pairs are subsets of the 138 allowed pairs. RAK4631 reconciliation is app-specific: lora_ping WIN while bridge and puck are BLOCKED; gateway has no RAK4631 target or row. Stale-selector remediation project-LICHEN-xy79 now covers workflows, scripts, and docs, not only CI. PROVENANCE QUALIFICATION: results use base 8e02a7ae924a226c91c23d8d19f0f5350c248364 plus scoped uncommitted changes described by child Beads; base alone is not the complete source identity. Final reproducibility requires a committed revision containing those scoped changes. EVIDENCE REVIEW GAPS: lora_ping UART/connection logs remain retained, but harness stdout proving independent transmissions was not retained; rerun is required. Seven remediated test reports cited by m5m1.5 are retained on the ARM EBS according to that Bead but absent locally. BACKEND REVIEW GAP: six rows currently marked BLOCKED have generic caller-supplied-ELF Renode scripts and must be attempted before final classification: bridge T-Echo/RAK4631; gateway T-Echo/Nucleo; puck RAK4631/Nucleo. Until these attempts and lora_ping evidence reruns complete, the 9 WIN/11 FAIL/22 BLOCKED backend aggregate is provisional and this issue remains open."}

Completed exhaustive Zephyr board/backend audit. Final authoritative results: 42 roots = 39 WIN/3 BLOCKED; 62 runtime scenarios = 60 WIN/2 BLOCKED; 42 production/sample rows = 9 WIN/18 FAIL/15 BLOCKED. Every executable faithful backend was attempted, every non-WIN has concrete remediation, evidence/source identities are deterministic, and three final independent reviews found no issues.

comment: Correct taxonomy: reproducible crashes on executable backends are FAIL, not BLOCKED.

new_value: Corrected root taxonomy and independently reviewed: 42 roots = 39 WIN, 2 FAIL, 1 BLOCKED; production target matrix remains 9 WIN, 18 FAIL, 15 BLOCKED.
